Peter,

I've said it before and I will say it again:_**the Mainstream Media is out to bring down my Administration.**_

It's a 24/7 barrage of hit jobs, fake stories, and absolute hatred for everything we stand for as a movement.

It's time to once again release our Mainstream Media Accountability Survey to show them that the American people are fed up with the Fake News machine.

They don't care about the truth. They don't care about what's right. They only care about propping up the liberal Democrats they worship and destroying anyone who wants to put America First.

name: The White House
subject: Building America’s Prosperity and America’s Partnerships
body:
1600 Daily
https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=32921443a7bf35d202c96339a152a99885a2706e57bff9cfd2436a1be267fba7816c4b30de170e35795cba529c037faf7f9d46f0b94ac3b5

The Unified Framework for Tax Reform that is supported by President Trump will mean hardworking Americans can keep more of their money. The average American household income could increase between $4,000 and $9,000 a year in wages and salary alone by cutting the Federal corporate income tax rate from 35 percent to 20 percent, according to an analysis by the Council of Economic Advisors (CEA). “Lower taxes on American business means higher wages for American workers, and it means more products made right here in the USA.” – President Donald J. Trump

-------------

President Trump Urges Optimism, Hope for America’s Future
Last night, President Trump delivered the keynote address at The Heritage Foundation’s annual President’s Club Meeting. The President encouraged all Americans to have confidence in the future of our Nation and immense pride in our history. President Trump drew attention to the once-in-a-generation opportunity to make history by fighting for pay raises for all Americans through tax reform and investing in American businesses and jobs.

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=32921443a7bf35d25ca7489c63a61f844ce3c77213115a382541499021add0cabe120ebb995e4da9b57966e5afd6d743bd455e4684bf444c
Watch here.

Vice President Talks Tax Relief in Buffalo, NY
Vice President Mike Pence traveled to Buffalo, New York, on Tuesday to talk about the Administration’s America first tax relief plan with local businesses, community leaders, and families. The current tax code is broken and burdensome on American taxpayers and job-creators. The new plan will provide middle-class tax relief by permanently reducing tax rates, restoring the competitive edge of American businesses by lowering the corporate tax rate, eliminating loopholes and reducing paperwork to one page, making the tax code simple, easy, and fair, and returning trillions of dollars in wealth parked overseas to the American economy.

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=7ea03a06da6d96dd6c7e8f7509f53c4999f7a92506df58410aa767f1c160bfb1ddafaa16157afbc9e91fdb501db663d9775dae29d2b913fe
Learn more about how this vital tax relief will strengthen the middle class, grow the economy, and unleash America’s economic comeback.

Prime Minister of Greece Visits the White House
On Tuesday afternoon, President Trump welcomed the Prime Minister of Greece, Alexis Tsipras, to the White House. After a working luncheon, the two leaders held a joint press conference in the Rose Garden. Both leaders remarked on the strong, historic relationship that Greece and the United States share.

“A strong and flourishing Greece provides immense opportunity for American trade, investment, and job creation,” said President Trump.

Prime Minister Tsipras expressed his gratitude for the invitation to the White House and spoke of the nations’ relationship in light of recent and historical partnerships. “Today, our strategy is based on mutual respect, and it is fed by the significant support provided by the U.S. to Greece and to the Greek people during the hard times of the economic crisis,” he said.

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=7ea03a06da6d96dd05cabf9e470cd68a71880401046124f458ffffa30b6293f80b05033bd6c6e021ee54e628f6e98c72731dca4dda072bc7
Watch the press conference.

Photo of the Day

President Donald J. Trump in the Oval Office | October 17, 2017 (Official White House Photo by D. Myles Cullen)

POTUS TODAY

Today, President Trump recieved his daily intelligence briefng and spoke with Governor Kim Reynolds of Iowa by telephone. Later, the President participated in a meeting with the bipartisan group of Senators from the Senate Finance Committee to discuss the tax cuts and reform, and stressed the urgent need to deliver tax relief to the American people.

COMING UP

On Friday, First Lady Melania Trump will be joined by designer Hervé Pierre at the Smithsonian to present her inauguration gown as the newest addition to the nearly 100-year old First Ladies Collection.

Over the weekend, the White House will be opening its gardens and grounds to visitors for the Fall Garden Tours.
https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=7ea03a06da6d96dd90efbb35749f72f4a8961fd9a802c1e109b997955ca4d61b3f3d226d76a558241b69f9cb6dac8cd554f9881fa1f8277b
Read more.

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=7ea03a06da6d96ddfa4a8183f1fc0e75bb5568cb226e4b436924b1137ef4d95c4da11d31e9fbb92ce75f6066a1ddb483b2b6574a39493189
Privacy Policy |

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=7ea03a06da6d96dd9d5678bf0054602e5f95ff39039b1bf9cab92b67ba9b615757fff68b0e5bc803af9aad9bc6735b9b4d4b3314bc2d0090
Contact the White House |

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/unsub_center.aspx?qs=d453c42a6560d1d45c224fe96ce4fd39d975d4aad2f7db2122c94f501d1c30f0daacc06a64973c1c14bfc9ee04c13583060cee2e883c50d5

name: LegitPAC Team
subject: When we win
body:
[ Legit ]LegitPAC

Friend,

Red states have just as much to gain from bolstering democratic
legitimacy as blue and purple states -- and so do the rest of us.
Indeed, participation from red states is critical to legitimacy.

But the way things stand right now, we need to do more to build up
pro-democracy champions in red states.

That’s why Legit supporters throughout the country are coming together
to support Kathie Allen for Utah’s 3rd congressional district and Doug
Jones for Senate in Alabama today. Allen and Jones have winnable
elections this fall, so our support right now can make a big
difference.

[ https://act.legitaction.com/go/1707?t=1002&akid=340%2E356062%2EeZ2U_5 ]Contribute $3 today to support red state
champions of legitimacy with winnable elections this fall: Kathie
Allen (UT-03) and Doug Jones (AL-Sen).

Kathie Allen has committed to fight to end partisan gerrymandering,
strengthen voting rights, and reduce the influence of super PACs in
elections. These are positions Utah voters support, but her opponent
will be tough to beat without support from small donors and grassroots
folks.

Doug Jones represents our opportunity to fill Jeff Sessions’ seat in

name: Team Kaine
subject: Inside Senator Kaine's new health care plan:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kaine for Virginia
body:
---
| Tim introduced new legislation this week called Medicare-X that gives more insurance options to more Americans, so folks can choose an affordable plan that is best for their health.

**We need to keep leaders like Tim in the Senate who will fight for legislation that puts people ahead of politics.[If you support his reelection, pitch in $10 today to make sure we can build a smart, tough campaign.](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=OIm%2FKJqol0bT%2FXCvoAbhhEj91ryCr%2FGS)**

**[DONATE](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=oDpb%2F3874xCuhSlMHcEdakj91ryCr%2FGS)**
---

Earlier this week, Tim introduced new legislation to create a plan called **Medicare-X** , which would expand affordable insurance options for folks across the country.

**What is Medicare-X?**

Medicare-X is a public plan that would offer families, individuals, and small businesses more low-cost health insurance choices.

**Why is it called Medicare-X?**

This legislation, the Medicare-X Choice Act, builds on the existing Medicare framework so that Americans can have a choice of an affordable, high-quality public insurance plan on the exchanges.

**Why do we need Medicare-X?**

Last week, President Trump signed an executive order that destabilizes our health care system and which could cause premiums to go up, people to lose their coverage, and insurers to be driven out of the marketplace. There's already a shortage of insurers and higher health care costs in some areas (especially rural communities), and this action from the President is only going to make things worse.

Medicare-X prioritizes these areas that are hit hardest -- and by 2023, it would expand to every single ZIP code in the country. By the following year, it would be added as another option for small businesses to opt into.

**The bottom line:

Americans deserve more health care choices, at lower prices. By creating this permanent Medicare-X option, folks everywhere will be able to choose an affordable plan that is best for their health.**

Tim won't stand idly by as President Trump sabotages our health care system. And while many congressional Republicans may continue their attempts to dismantle health care at every turn, we can't let that distract us. We need to build on the progress toward universal coverage that President Obama started seven years ago with the Affordable Care Act.

That's why it's critical that we keep leaders like Tim in the Senate -- leaders committed to introducing legislation that helps families, not willing to play politics with Americans' lives and livelihoods.

**If you agree, make a contribution today to support Tim's reelection to the Senate. We can't afford to move backwards -- so chip in $10 or whatever you can afford, and say you're in for six more years of putting people above politics.**

Thanks for your support.

-Team Kaine

name: Michael Tyler, Democrats.org
subject: Don't sleep on Trump in 2020
body:
Let's get to work.
---
**Republicans have proven they cannot govern. Commit to helping Democrats win.

** **[I'M IN](http://my.democrats. "http://my.democrats.org/Commit-to-Electing-Democrats1?keycode=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20112&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=1+-+IM+IN&utm_campaign=em_20171018_mt_nd1&source=em_20171018_mt_nd1")**
Derek, this president doesn't deserve another day in the White House, let alone a second term. But that doesn't mean we can take anything for granted:

[](http://my.democrats. "http://my.democrats.org/Commit-to-Electing-Democrats1?keycode=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20112&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=2&utm_campaign=em_20171018_mt_nd1&source=em_20171018_mt_nd1")
We see every day why Donald Trump is unfit to lead: His reckless foreign policy. His all-out assault on women's rights, Obamacare, and the First Amendment. His inability to focus on jobs and the economy. His failure to denounce white supremacists and his insensitive treatment of our fellow Americans who are reeling from historic hurricane damage in Puerto Rico. His Twitter account.

But no one is coming to save us from this administration -- not the courts, not the press, and certainly not this Republican-led Congress.

It's on us, Derek.

We have to organize and mobilize our communities. We have to march, rally, attend town hall meetings, and get out the vote in every community -- every time there's an election -- in order to get America back on track.

**Add your name if you're ready to get to work:

** **[I'M IN](http://my.democrats. "http://my.democrats.org/Commit-to-Electing-Democrats1?keycode=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20112&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=3+-+IM+IN&utm_campaign=em_20171018_mt_nd1&source=em_20171018_mt_nd1")**
Thanks,

Michael

subject: 2 terrible Republican senators + the women who can defeat them >>
body:
We elect pro-choice Democratic women who will fight for women and families. | [ ](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c62af/24c69fd9/8421461d/189c82f5/1179735209/VEsH/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/donate-to-emily?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=1+-+%0D%0A++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++&utm_campaign=WQEFEJ34N_digital_email_20171018_OnNoticeSenate_inact&source=WQEFEJ34N_digital_email_20171018_OnNoticeSenate_inact")
---

Peter,

Senators Dean Heller (NV) and Jeff Flake (AZ) shouldn't get too comfortable. Why not?

Because they're vulnerable.

Because they've taken awful votes that hurt women and families.

Because we're coming for their seats with two women -- Jacky Rosen and Kyrsten Sinema -- who are so, SO much better.

**[Donate $3 to help Jacky and Kyrsten kick these Republicans out of seats they don't deserve to occupy.](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c62af/24c69fd9/8421461d/189c82f6/1179735209/VEsE/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20171018_email_OnNoticeSenate?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=2+-+Donate+3+to+help+Jacky+and+Kyrsten+kick+&utm_campaign=WQEFEJ34N_digital_email_20171018_OnNoticeSenate_inact&source=WQEFEJ34N_digital_email_20171018_OnNoticeSenate_inact")**
[](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c62af/24c69fd9/8421461d/189c82f7/1179735209/VEsF/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20171018_email_OnNoticeSenate?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=3&utm_campaign=WQEFEJ34N_digital_email_20171018_OnNoticeSenate_inact&source=WQEFEJ34N_digital_email_20171018_OnNoticeSenate_inact")
We put these men "On Notice" because their constituents deserve better, and we have two pro-choice Democratic women strong enough to defeat them.

Jacky is a fearless champion the people of Nevada can rely on, while Heller pledged to protect Planned Parenthood before breaking his word less than 24 hours later.

Kyrsten has fought hard in the House to create opportunities for the working families of her district, while Flake voted THREE times in a single month to strip millions of Americans of their health care.

**These are our two best opportunities to flip Senate seats next year. Donate $3 to send Heller and Flake packing and replace them with pro-choice champions:**

**[https://secure.emilyslist.org/Replace-On-Notice-Republican-Senators](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c62af/24c69fd9/8421461d/189c82f0/1179735209/VEsC/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20171018_email_OnNoticeSenate?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=4+-+httpssecureemilyslistorgReplaceOnNoticeR&utm_campaign=WQEFEJ34N_digital_email_20171018_OnNoticeSenate_inact&source=WQEFEJ34N_digital_email_20171018_OnNoticeSenate_inact")**

Thanks,

Jenna Kruse
Vice President of Research, EMILY's List

name: Chris Van Hollen
subject: our children deserve better
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Van Hollen for US Senate
body:
| __
President Trump and Congressional Republicans just won't quit when it comes to playing politics with our health care system. On top of all they've done in recent months to undermine the ACA, now they have let a program that provides health insurance for over 9 million low-income children in our country expire.

The Children's Health Insurance Program (CHIP) is the cornerstone of our efforts to ensure that over 90% of children in America have health insurance. Passed in 1997, CHIP has long enjoyed bipartisan support -- until now.

[**Sign here to stand against Trump and demand that Senate Republicans support children's access to health care >>**](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91ba0/70cdc2ba/46ac6c72/397d716/576346231/VEsH/ "https://cvanhollen.cp.bsd.net/page/signup/sign-demand-congress-reauthorize-chip-?utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=1+-+Sign+here+to+stand+against+Trump+and+dem&utm_campaign=em101817&source=em101817")

In Maryland, as a result of programs like CHIP, the uninsured rate among children is at a record low 3.9%. But instead of focusing on renewing the authorization for CHIP, which expired at the end of August, Republicans spent September waging their war against the Affordable Care Act. The health care of over 9 million kids, including more than 142,300 in Maryland, hangs in the balance.

[**We can 't allow the Republicans to leave millions of children without access to health care. CHIP must be reauthorized immediately. Sign here if you agree >>**](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91ba0/70cdc2ba/46ac6c72/397d717/576346231/VEsE/ "https://cvanhollen.cp.bsd.net/page/signup/sign-demand-congress-reauthorize-chip-?utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=2+-+We+canrsquot+allow+the+Republicans+to+le&utm_campaign=em101817&source=em101817")

This is not a controversial program--it's effective, bipartisan, and critical to the health of kids across our country. There is no excuse for those who are playing politics with CHIP. Our children deserve better.

Thank you for all you do,

Chris Van Hollen
U.S. Senator
